title: trollius europaeus f. humilis
intro: Trollius europaeus f. humilis is a low-growing variant of the globe-flower plant, a perennial species in the Ranunculaceae family, known for its delicate white or pale yellow flowers and edible roots. The medicinal properties of Trollius europaeus f. humilis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its saponin and alkaloid content. The health benefits of consuming this plant include its potential to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy in traditional herbal medicine. Trollius europaeus f. humilis can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and its roots can also be dried and used as a powder in teas, capsules, or topical applications.
